bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle for the backdrop root and split depth bands into parallax child sprites during scene assembly.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_tower_backdrop_parallax_1920x1080.png through AssetServer during floor setup and assign it to the TowerBackdrop root entity.
runtime_notes: Background depth bands scroll at 0.3, 0.6, and 1.0 camera speed ratios so the tower feels tall without hiding gameplay silhouettes.
Keep the darkest shadow wells directly behind traversal lanes so moving light hazards remain readable at one glance.
Do not animate the entire sheet; only subtle layer translation should occur from camera movement.

context.usage: Primary full-screen backdrop for every floor, establishing the art-deco tower city, window rhythm, and silhouette-based navigation mood.

shape.silhouette: A three-depth twilight tower skyline with art-deco arches, window ribs, suspended bridges, and deep shadow wells cut through the midground.

specs.lighting: Amber windows and beam spills stay localized so the safe shadow lanes read as dark teal-black masses.

acceptance_criteria: Backdrop contains three readable depth bands with the central traversal lane kept visually open for hazards and the player silhouette.
Bright amber window accents occupy less than 8 percent of the frame area so the shadow-navigation mood stays dominant.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds puzzle rules, object dimensions, HUD placement, and the Bevy 0.14 technical targets for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art-deco tower mood, silhouette layering, amber beam contrast, and architectural ornament rhythm.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra silhouette proportions, eye-glow placement, and cloak-like shadow contours for player and echo scale checks.
